title: VETERANS SERVICES - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY VETERANS SERVICE OFFICE VETERANS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Serves as the entry point to understanding the benefits, resources, and entitlements available to veterans, their dependents, and survivors, including: -Veterans' benefits counseling and claims preparation assistance, as well as advocacy throughout the claims process -Counseling on federal VA benefits and other state and federal ancillary benefits -Educational benefit claims assistance -Assistance for veterans who wish to enroll in health care -Assistance for requesting military service documents -Service-connected and non-service-related disability and survivor benefits -Burial benefits -Information about veteran home loans 2051 Kaen Road Suite 281 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Veterans with any discharge status other than dishonorable and their immediate family members (spouse, un-remarried surviving spouse, child, or stepchild) Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 650-5631 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 650-5631 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: A copy of the veteran's discharge document (DD214 or Honorable Discharge). If these records are not available, the VSO will help get them. If other records are needed, the VSO will let the client know. AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 33 Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Burial Benefits * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues General Health Insurance Information/Counseling * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Military Records If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY VETERANS SERVICE OFFICE
